data.label: Micro3D
data.dev_team: J2ME Loader Project / Open Source Community
data.description: libmicro3d.so 和 libjavam3g.so 是 J2ME 模拟器中使用的原生共享库，用于支持 JSR-184（Mobile 3D Graphics API）。这些库负责 3D 渲染、数学计算、JNI 绑定，以及支持 3D Java ME 游戏和应用所需的运行时能力。它们协同工作，以提升基于 M3G 的 J2ME 软件的性能和兼容性。

data.label: Micro3D
data.dev_team: J2ME Loader Project / Open Source Community
data.description:
libmicro3d.so and libjavam3g.so are native shared libraries used in
J2ME emulators to provide support for JSR-184 (Mobile 3D Graphics API). These libraries handle 3D rendering, mathematical calculations,
JNI bindings, and runtime support required by 3D-enabled Java ME
games and applications. They work together to improve performance
and compatibility for M3G-based J2ME software.
